expectations.text: Response defines or names at least 3 distinct tools
expectations.evidence: 3 tools: list_tables, describe_table, run_query in server.setRequestHandler('tools/list')

expectations.text: Response addresses read-only safety — blocking non-SELECT statements
expectations.evidence: run_query handler checks: if (!args.query.trim().toUpperCase().startsWith('SELECT')) throw new Error('Only SELECT queries are allowed')

expectations.text: Response uses an environment variable for the database connection string
Response includes error handling with actionable messages for bad queries or connection failures
expectations.evidence: The SELECT check throws a basic error. No handling for connection failures, table-not-found errors, or permission issues. Uses old low-level Server API without structured error handling.

expectations.text: Response mentions the @modelcontextprotocol/sdk package or MCP SDK
